# viettelidc_ovpc_security_group_rule (Resource)

ViettelIDC Security Group Rule — inbound or outbound rule attached to a Security Group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `direction` (String) Direction of traffic: "in" (inbound/ingress) or "out" (outbound/egress).
- `rule_type` (String) Rule type as shown in portal: "Custom TCP", "Custom UDP", "All TCP", "All UDP", "All ICMP - IPv4", "SSH", "DNS", "HTTP", "HTTPS", "IMAP".
- `security_group_id` (String)

### Optional

- `action` (String) Default "New". Set to "Delete" to remove.
- `destination_ip` (String)
- `is_valid` (Boolean)
- `port` (String)
- `protocol_name` (String)
- `source_ip` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
